# SUPERSEDED — do not edit or cite

The per-section drafts in this directory (and `../article3_phase1_v1.md`,
`../skeleton.md`, `../phase1_results.md`) are v1 working drafts retained
for history. They contain the pre-correction (silent-fabrication
contaminated) numbers and the old "Multi-Application" title.

The canonical manuscript is `../article3_phase1_v1_6.md`; the canonical
cover letter is `../cover_letter_emse_phase1_v1_6.md`. Any number that
disagrees between the two generations is superseded by v1.6 — see
manuscript §3.5/§6.1 and the README "Data Integrity" section for why.

In particular, `07_conclusion.md` cites Zenodo version DOI
10.5281/zenodo.20620871, which covers tag `v0.3.0-phase1-pilot` only;
the v1.6 submission uses a new version DOI minted at tag
`v1.6.0-emse-option-b`.
